annotations.title: AquaGold® Fine Touch | Lind Plastic Surgery & Med Spa
AquaGold Facial Microchanneling In Houston | BCRN Aesthetics
Aquagold Facial in Houston, TX | Eugene Alford, MD
AquaGold Facial Treatment in Houston, TX | Queen Aesthetic
AquaGold Facial Treatment in Houston, TX | Queen Aesthetic

content.text:
Here are several reputable providers in the Houston area offering the AquaGold® Fine Touch microchanneling facial, along with key details to help you choose the right one for your needs:

1. **Lind Plastic Surgery & Med Spa**  
   - Located in Houston, this practice offers the luxury AquaGold Fine Touch treatment using patented spiral 24-karat gold microneedles. Treatments are tailored to individual needs and may include serums such as hyaluronic acid, Vitamin C, peptides, antioxidants, and even neuromodulators like Jeuveau or BOTOX®. The procedure is quick (about 30 minutes), virtually painless, and typically shows immediate results with little to no downtime([lindplasticsurgery.com](https://www.lindplasticsurgery.com/med-spa/skin-rejuvenation/aquagold-fine-touch?utm_source=openai)).

2. **BCRN Aesthetics**  
   - Offering AquaGold Facial microchanneling, this med-spa delivers customized cocktails (including neurotoxins, dermal fillers, antioxidants) that help improve skin tone, texture, minimize pore size, reduce wrinkles and boost radiance—again, with minimal downtime([bcrnaesthetics.com](https://www.bcrnaesthetics.com/services/microchanneling-aquagold-facial/?utm_source=openai)).

3. **Alford Facial Plastic Surgery (Dr. Eugene Alford)**  
   - Located in Houston, this clinic offers the Aquagold facial—also called the “Botox facial”—using a 24-carat gold micro-infusion device to deliver customizable serums. Benefits include reduced fine lines, pore size shrinkage, plumping, even tone, and longer-lasting results (typically 3–6 months)([texasface.com](https://texasface.com/procedures/nonsurgical/aquagold-facial-houston-tx?utm_source=openai)).

4. **Queen Aesthetics**  
   - Located at 333 W Loop N., Suite #440 in Houston, this med-spa provides AquaGold facials starting at $750 (package deals available). The treatment targets pores, fine lines, wrinkles, pigmentation, acne scarring, and more. Immediate glow can last up to four weeks, with recovery generally requiring 1–2 hours for redness to subside([queenaesthetics.net](https://www.queenaesthetics.net/aquagold-facial?utm_source=openai)).

5. **Haus Of Skin**  
   - Located at 1150 Durham Drive, Loft #8, Houston (77007), this studio lists AquaGold among its aesthetic services. Though specific pricing isn't listed, this indicates they offer the treatment in their service menu([hausofskin.net](https://www.hausofskin.net/services?utm_source=openai)).

6. **Greenderm Clinic (Pricing Insight)**  
   - Aesthetic pricing from Greenderm includes an AquaGold Micro Infusion Facial at approximately $650+, depending on the customized cocktail used([greenderm.com](https://www.greenderm.com/assets/aesthetic_pricing_2025_2026.pdf?utm_source=openai)).

---

### Quick Comparison Table (Summary)

Provider | Location | Notable Details
---|---|---
**Lind Plastic Surgery & Med Spa** | Houston | Customized serums (HA, peptides, Botox-type), ~30-min, immediate results
**BCRN Aesthetics** | Houston area | Tailored cocktails, improvements in tone/texture, minimal downtime
**Alford Facial Plastic Surgery** | Houston | “Botox facial”, 3–6 month results, customizable
**Queen Aesthetics** | Loop N. Houston | $750+ per session, glow lasts up to 4 weeks
**Haus Of Skin** | Houston 77007 | Includes AquaGold in service offerings (details via consultation)
**Greenderm Clinic** | | Pricing benchmark—approximately $650+ per session

---

### Recommendations for Next Steps

- **Confirm your goals**: Are you aiming for a pre-event glow, long-term rejuvenation, hydration, fine-line reduction, or a combination?
- **Consider budget**: Pricing ranges roughly between $650 and $750 per session, depending on the provider and concoction used([greenderm.com](https://www.greenderm.com/assets/aesthetic_pricing_2025_2026.pdf?utm_source=openai)).
- **Schedule consultations**: All these providers recommend a consultation to customize the serum blend and assess your suitability.
- **Ask about downtime and after-care**: Redness typically lasts from several minutes to a couple of hours. Queen Aesthetics advises avoiding heavy exfoliants and sun exposure for up to two weeks post-treatment([queenaesthetics.net](https://www.queenaesthetics.net/aquagold-facial?utm_source=openai)).

---
